title.en: England players to get hoarding warning after freak Henderson injury
title.zh-CN: 英格兰球员在亨德森受伤后获得囤积警告

summary.en: England players will be advised not to jump over advertising hoardings after Jordan Henderson suffered a freak injury.
summary.zh-CN: 在乔丹·亨德森（ Jordan Henderson ）受伤后，英格兰球员将被建议不要跳过广告囤积。

title.en: The superstar double act that became England's Wonderwall
title.zh-CN: 成为英格兰Wonderwall的超级明星双人表演

summary.en: With 10 of England's 11 goals at the World Cup scored by either Harry Kane or Jude Bellingham, BBC Sport looks at how dependent on them the team is.
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）或裘德·贝灵汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）在世界杯上打进了英格兰11个进球中的10个， BBC Sport着眼于球队对他们的依赖程度。

title.en: Qarabag's Duran poised for Celtic medical
title.zh-CN: Qarabag的Duran为凯尔特医疗做好准备

summary.en: Colombian forward Camilo Duran is poised to become Celtic's first summer signing, arriving for an undisclosed fee from Qarabag, manager Martin O'Neill confirms.
summary.zh-CN: 经理马丁·奥尼尔（ Martin O'Neill ）证实，哥伦比亚前锋卡米洛·杜兰（ Camilo Duran ）有望成为凯尔特人首次夏季签约，从卡拉巴格（ Qarabag ）获得未公开的费用。

title.en: 9.1m watch England's epic win over Mexico
title.zh-CN: 910万观看英格兰对墨西哥的史诗般的胜利

summary.en: A peak audience of 9.1 million tuned in overnight to watch England beat Mexico to reach the quarter-finals of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 910万的高峰观众在一夜之间观看了英格兰击败墨西哥进入世界杯四分之一决赛。

title.en: La Liga chief critical of 'complicit silence' surrounding Fifa
title.zh-CN: 西甲联赛主席批评国际足联周围的“同谋沉默”

summary.en: La Liga president Javier Tebas has criticised the "complicit silence" which surrounds Fifa after the Folarin Balogun controversy.
summary.zh-CN: 西甲主席哈维尔·特巴斯（ Javier Tebas ）批评了Folarin Balogun争议后围绕国际足联的“同谋沉默”。

title.en: A shambolic end for the American dream - did Balogun saga play a part?
title.zh-CN: 美国梦的混乱结局- Balogun传奇是否扮演了一个角色？

summary.en: Mauricio Pochettino says he feels "disappointed with too many people" who brought "politics and manipulation" into the game as the US exit World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 毛里西奥·波切蒂诺（ Mauricio Pochettino ）表示，随着美国退出世界杯，他对太多人将“政治和操纵”带入比赛感到“失望”。

title.en: Fernandez header seals dramatic Argentina comeback
title.zh-CN: 费尔南德斯头封戏剧性的阿根廷卷土重来

summary.en: Enzo Fernandez scores late to give Argentina the lead against Egypt in their last 16 match at the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 恩佐·费尔南德斯（ Enzo Fernandez ）在2026年世界杯的最后16场比赛中得分较晚，让阿根廷队领先埃及队。

title.en: Messi rescues Argentina with equaliser against Egypt
title.zh-CN: 梅西用对埃及的均衡器拯救阿根廷

summary.en: Lionel Messi scores a late equaliser for Argentina against Egypt to level the game at 2-2 during their match in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）在亚特兰大比赛中为阿根廷对阵埃及的比赛取得了后期扳平比分，比分为2-2。

title.en: Did VAR correctly rule out this Egypt goal?
title.zh-CN: VAR是否正确地排除了这个埃及目标？

summary.en: Mostafa Zico has his goal for Egypt ruled out following a VAR review, for a foul on Lisandro Martinez in the build up, during their World Cup last 16 match in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 莫斯塔法·齐科（ Mostafa Zico ）在VAR审查后排除了他对埃及的进球，因为他们在亚特兰大的世界杯最后16场比赛中对利桑德罗·马丁内斯（ Lisandro Martinez ）犯规。

title.en: Messi denied from penalty spot by 'brilliant' Shobeir save
title.zh-CN: 梅西被“出色”的Shobeir SAVE拒绝进入点球位置

summary.en: Lionel Messi misses his second penalty of the 2026 World Cup, as his effort is saved by Egypt's Mostafa Shobeir in Atlanta.
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）错过了2026年世界杯的第二个点球，因为他的努力得到了亚特兰大埃及选手穆斯塔法·舒贝尔（ Mostafa Shobeir ）

title.en: Belgium make light work of US to set up quarter-final tie with Spain
title.zh-CN: 比利时在美国与西班牙建立四分之一决赛领带方面做得很轻松

summary.en: Belgium ease past a defensively sloppy USA in a match shrouded in controversy surrounding Folarin Balogun's delayed suspension, a scandal that made little impact on the pitch.
summary.zh-CN: 比利时在一场围绕Folarin Balogun延迟停赛的争议中笼罩着一场防守草率的美国比赛，这一丑闻对球场几乎没有影响。

title.en: Fifa's Balogun decision could lead to football 'cesspit' - McAllister
title.zh-CN: 国际足联的Balogun决定可能导致足球“粪坑” -麦卡利斯特

summary.en: Uefa vice-president Laura McAllister says there is a risk of "an absolute cesspit" of political interference in football after USA striker Folarin Balogun avoided a ban at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 欧足联副主席劳拉·麦卡利斯特（ Laura McAllister ）表示，在美国前锋弗拉林·巴洛根（ Folarin Balogun ）避免世界杯禁赛后，存在政治干预足球的“绝对阴影”的风险。

title.en: 'Overturn this' - Belgium taunt US and say Trump move fired them up
title.zh-CN: “推翻这个” -比利时嘲笑美国并说特朗普的举动解雇了他们

summary.en: Belgium's Nicolas Raskin says Fifa's decision to allow US striker Folarin Balogun to play against them fired them up for the last-16 tie in Seattle.
summary.zh-CN: 比利时的尼古拉斯·拉斯金（ Nicolas Raskin ）表示，国际足联决定允许美国前锋弗拉林·巴洛根（ Folarin Balogun ）与他们比赛，这让他们在西雅图的最后16场比赛中被解雇。

title.en: England's Best Since 1966 - Tuchel's Biggest Statement Yet?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰自1966年以来最好的-图切尔有史以来最伟大的声明？

summary.en: Is this what World Cup winners look like?
summary.zh-CN: 这就是世界杯冠军的样子吗？

title.en: Mbappe condemns racist posts from Paraguay senator
title.zh-CN: 姆巴佩谴责巴拉圭参议员的种族主义帖子

summary.en: France forward Kylian Mbappe condemns a Paraguayan senator as "despicable" and unworthy of her position after she made a number of racist remarks mocking his origin and education.
summary.zh-CN: 法国前锋基利安·姆巴佩（ Kylian Mbappe ）在嘲笑巴拉圭参议员的出身和教育后发表了一系列种族主义言论，谴责巴拉圭参议员“卑鄙” ，不值得她的立场。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 30

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

title.en: Why European backlash over Trump intervention won't worry Infantino

summary.en: After 10 years as Fifa president, could the Folarin Balogun controversy tip the balance against Gianni Infantino? Don't bet on it.

title.en: England into quarter-finals - what is their path to the final?

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after progressing the quarter-finals.

title.en: Argentina come from two down to beat Egypt in World Cup classic

summary.en: Argentina produced an astonishing comeback to keep their World Cup alive as they recovered from two down to beat Egypt 3-2 in stoppage-time.

title.en: Manzambi & Vargas both missing for Switzerland vs Colombia LIVE!
Keane praises 'streetfighter' mentality from Argentina in historic comeback
Argentina semi-final remains on! England's route to the World Cup final...

summary.en: What is England's potential path to World Cup glory?

title.en: England trying to fast track James' recovery ahead of Norway

summary.en: England’s medics are working hard on Reece James in the hope that he may be able to help England’s right-back crisis and play some part in the World Cup quarter-final against Norway on...

title.en: Tearful Messi inspires Argentina’s great escape in World Cup thriller with Egpyt

summary.en: The golden rule of football? Never write off Lionel Messi. Just when it looked like his dream of leading Argentina to the bicampeonato was in tatters, the 39-year-old came to his country’s rescue for...

title.en: Spain into quarter-finals after Merino's late winner against Portugal

summary.en: Spain leave it late as super-sub Mikel Merino scores a stoppage-time winner to send his side into the quarter-finals, ending Cristiano Ronaldo's hopes of World Cup glory.

title.en: How England's epic night at the Azteca unfolded

summary.en: Relive all the drama from England’s 3-2 win over Mexico, as Thomas Tuchel’s team progressed to a quarter-final meeting with Norway on Saturday.

title.en: Bellingham scores two in 98 seconds to silence the Azteca

summary.en: Jude Bellingham scores two goals in 98 seconds to give England a 2-0 lead over Mexico during their last 16 match at the Mexico City Stadium.

title.en: 'Nasty, nasty challenge' - Quansah shown red card

summary.en: England are reduced to 10 men as Jarrel Quansah is shown a red card following a VAR review for a "nasty" challenge on Mexico's Jesus Gallardo.

title.en: 'I'm speechless' - Kane reacts to England's victory over Mexico

summary.en: A very hoarse sounding England captain Harry Kane gives his reaction to England's 3-2 victory over Mexico and praises the fans support.
